trial_details.trajectory:
The pod is in a failed state with the ErrImageNeverPull status, indicating an issue with the container image.The describe output shows that the pod is unable to pull the container image `misspeling-app:latset` due to the "ErrImageNeverPull" error. The image name is misspelled as "misspeling-app" instead of "misspelling-app".The issue was caused by a misspelled container image name. I used `kubectl patch` to update the image field in the deployment spec to the correct "misspelling-app:latest" value.

FIX COMPLETE

## COMMANDS EXECUTED:
1. $ kubectl get pod misspelling-deployment-6579ff5454-hhts7 -n case6-test
   Output: NAME                                      READY   STATUS              RESTARTS   AGE
misspelling-deployment-6579ff5454-hhts7   0/1     ErrImageNeverPull   0          12s...
2. $ kubectl describe pod misspelling-deployment-6579ff5454-hhts7 -n case6-test
   Output: Name:             misspelling-deployment-6579ff5454-hhts7
Namespace:        case6-test
Priority:         0
Service Account:  default
Node:             minikube/192.168.49.2
Start Time:       Thu, 25 D...
3. $ kubectl patch deployment misspelling-deployment -n case6-test --type=json -p='[{"op":"replace","path":"/spec/template/spec/containers/0/image","value":"misspelling-app:latest"}]'
   Output: deployment.apps/misspelling-deployment patched...
